# testing/factory/coffee.factory

> **Test Support Layer**

Pre-built [Coffee](../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) entity fixtures and a factory function
for creating test data.

## Remarks

Provides two individual fixtures ([flatWhiteCoffee](variables/flatWhiteCoffee.md),
[espressoCoffee](variables/espressoCoffee.md)), a pre-assembled list
([defaultCoffeeList](variables/defaultCoffeeList.md)), and a partial-override factory
([createCoffee](functions/createCoffee.md)).  [defaultCoffeeList](variables/defaultCoffeeList.md) and
[createCoffee](functions/createCoffee.md) are deprecated—see their individual doc
comments for migration guidance.

## Functions

| Function                                      | Description                                                                                                       |
| --------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [~~createCoffee~~](functions/createCoffee.md) | Creates a [Coffee](../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) entity with optional property overrides. |

## Variables

| Variable                                                | Description                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [flatWhiteCoffee](variables/flatWhiteCoffee.md)         | Pre-built flat white [Coffee](../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) fixture.                       |
| [espressoCoffee](variables/espressoCoffee.md)           | Pre-built espresso [Coffee](../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) fixture.                         |
| [~~defaultCoffeeList~~](variables/defaultCoffeeList.md) | Default list of [Coffee](../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) fixtures used by mock repositories. |
